name: loadModel
description: Loads a Modelica library by name into OMEdit (e.g. "Modelica"). Use loadFile to load a .mo file instead.

library.description: Name of the Modelica library to load (e.g. "Modelica").

version.description: Version of the library to load (e.g. "4.0.0"). Defaults to "default".

name: loadFile
description: Loads a .mo file into OMEdit by absolute file path.

fileName.description: Absolute path to the .mo file to load.

name: getSimulationResultPath
description: Returns the file path of the simulation result file for a given class, if it has been simulated and the result is loaded in OMEdit.

className.description: Fully qualified name of the model class.

name: resetEnvironment
description: Resets the OMEdit environment to a clean state: unloads all user-defined classes from the library, removes all open simulation result files, closes all plot windows, and clears all compilation and simulation output logs. Use this before loading a new test case.
